import io
import string
import list

fn max_index(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Int
  mut i = 1
  mut best = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      match xs.get(best)
      when Some(b)
        if v > b
          best = i
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  best
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        out = list.push(out, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut ti = 0
let tn = tokens.len()
while ti < tn
  match tokens.get(ti)
  when Some(t)
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  ti = ti + 1
end

let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

let total = nums.len()
let limit = if k > total
  total
else
  k
end

mut remaining = nums
mut taken = 0
mut result = ""
mut first = true
while taken < limit
  let idx = max_index(remaining)
  match remaining.get(idx)
  when Some(v)
    if first
      result = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      result = "#{result} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
  taken = taken + 1
end

print(result)
